title: rubus serpens subsp. oliganthus
intro: Rubus serpens subsp. oliganthus, commonly known as the dwarf dewberry, is a subspecies of the Rubus serpens species, a type of bramble or thorny shrub native to New Caledonia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus serpens subsp. oliganthus include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
